scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development concurrently -n "SHARED,FRONTEND,BACKEND" -c "green,red,blue" -p "[{name}]" "yarn run dev:shared" "yarn run dev:frontend" "yarn run dev:backend"
scripts.dev-proxy: yarn workspace shared run build && NODE_ENV=development VITE_USE_PROXY=true concurrently -n "SHARED,FRONTEND" -c "green,red" -p "[{name}]" "yarn run dev:shared" "yarn run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: yarn workspace shared run build && yarn workspace client run build && yarn workspace server run build
scripts.start: NODE_ENV=production yarn workspace server run start
